summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bar Stock Manager. All 5 tabs working (COUNT, INVENTORY, ORDERS, MANAGE, ACCOUNTING). All tested features passing: ACCOUNTING session view dialog, MANAGE tab sub-category input (no re-sort), Sale Price column, sub-category grouping display.
passed_tests: ACCOUNTING tab: Session 'View →' button opens dialog with Item, Bar, Beer, Lobby, Storage, Total columns grouped by category
MANAGE tab sub-category input: Typing 'Tequila' in sub_category field does NOT re-sort the row while typing - confirmed via screenshot
MANAGE tab Sale Price column: 'Sale ฿' header present between ฿/Case and Target columns, inputs accept numeric values
MANAGE tab sub-category grouping: Sub-categories (Alcopop, Rum, Housekeeping) displayed as indented italic labels under parent category headers
MANAGE tab inline editing: Name, $/Unit, $/Case, Target fields use local state with data-testid attributes
COUNT tab: Stock counting interface working with Bar, Beer, Lobby, Storage location inputs and Save & Continue button
INVENTORY tab: Table displays Have, Cases, Target, Need, Order, Vendor columns with View Orders button
ORDERS tab: Orders grouped by supplier (Singha99, Vendor, Makro) with Copy and Confirm buttons for each
Backend API: All 12 tests passed (items CRUD, stock-counts, stock-sessions, sale_price field, sub_category field)
critical_code_review_comments: Local state pattern (editingCell/editValue) correctly prevents re-sorting while editing text inputs - good implementation
Sub-category grouping logic in manageDisplayGroups correctly shows parent category header once with sub-categories as indented labels
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 81 items and 18 sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the bug fix request are verified working: (1) ACCOUNTING session view dialog opens correctly with count data grouped by category, (2) MANAGE tab text inputs use local state to prevent re-sorting while typing - save only happens on blur, (3) Sale Price column added and working, (4) Sub-category grouping shows parent category header once with sub-categories as indented labels. App has 81 items, 18 saved sessions. Backend uses MongoDB with sale_price field on Item model.
